scene.message: Chisato: Maki!{nl} You're all right!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: This is Pandora's{nl} doing...{waitkey}{ret}
Chisato: Pandora?{waitkey}{ret}
Chisato: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Yosuke: ...So that's{nl} how it was.{waitkey}{ret}
Yosuke: Hey, Chisato...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Chisato...{nl} thank you...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...Yeah.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Sonomura,{nl} open the door.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Okay.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Nomoraka tanomama...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: All right, let's go!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: It's open!{nl} Everyone, let's go!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: All right!{nl} Let's go, everyone!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Yes!{nl} Let's hurry and go!{waitkey}{ret}
